scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait postgres s3mock && pnpm --parallel --filter @katari-lang/runtime --filter @katari-lang/admin-web run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run build:haskell && pnpm run build:typescript
scripts.test: pnpm run test:haskell && pnpm run test:typescript
scripts.format: pnpm run format:haskell && pnpm run format:typescript
scripts.format:haskell: find haskell -path '*/.stack-work' -prune -o -name '*.hs' -type f -exec stack exec --package ormolu -- ormolu --mode inplace {} +
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:haskell && pnpm run typecheck:typescript
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:haskell && pnpm run lint:typescript
scripts.lint:haskell: find haskell -path '*/.stack-work' -prune -o -name '*.hs' -type f -exec stack exec --package hlint -- hlint {} +
scripts.lint-fix: pnpm run lint-fix:haskell && pnpm run lint-fix:typescript
scripts.lint-fix:haskell: find haskell -path '*/.stack-work' -prune -o -name '*.hs' -type f -exec stack exec --package hlint -- hlint --refactor --refactor-options="--inplace" {} \;
